Schema Generator Example Output

This page demonstrates the complete schema markup and meta tags generated by contractor-schema-generator.php

What's Included in This Page

SEO Title Tag - Optimized with company name, city, and trade
Meta Description - Includes rating, reviews, and call-to-action
Open Graph Tags - For Facebook, LinkedIn sharing
Twitter Card Tags - For Twitter sharing
Geographic Tags - Location data for local SEO
JSON-LD Schema - Complete LocalBusiness structured data

Schema Benefits

⭐ Star ratings displayed in Google search results
📞 Click-to-call phone numbers on mobile
🕒 Business hours shown in Knowledge Panel
📍 Map integration and location display
💰 Price range indicators
🔍 Enhanced local search visibility
📱 Better social media previews

Validate This Schema

Test this page's schema markup with Google's tools:

Google Rich Results Test Schema.org Validator

Note: View the page source to see the complete generated markup in the <head> section.

How to Use

Step 1: Include the generator file

require_once 'contractor-schema-generator.php';

Step 2: Prepare your data

$data = [
    'name' => 'Pyramid Heating & Cooling',
    'trade' => 'hvac',
    'phone' => '(503) 555-0142',
    'address' => 'Portland, OR',
    'lat' => 45.5231,
    'lng' => -122.6765,
    'rating' => 4.7,
    'review_count' => 143,
    'services' => ['Furnace Repair', 'AC Install'],
    'service_areas' => ['Portland', 'Beaverton'],
    'hours' => 'Mo-Fr 07:00-18:00'
];

Step 3: Generate and output

echo generate_head_section($data);

  • test-schema-generator.php - Run tests
